artPrompt: A frigid climate-controlled vault of humming server racks recedes into icy cyan haze, condensation breath fogging the cold air, tangled cables and blinking arcane glows lining the towering aisles. Frost rims the beige ducts overhead. A vast cathedral of municipal machinery, empty and shivering. Deep one-point-perspective film-still framing of monumental scale, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: The Server Room (Climate Controlled)
text:
{T}: Add {U}.
{3}{U}, {T}: Audit the most recent die roll or coin flip made by any player this turn. Reroll or reflip it; you choose which result is committed to the database. (The system never forgets. The system is also down.)
flavorText: Kept at a brisk 60 degrees for the servers. The staff were issued a memo about sweaters.

extras.parasitic: audits any player's most recent roll/flip
